feedback.emptyState: Submit a prompt to start getting feedback!

comprehension.sectionDescription: Shows how high-level vs. line-by-line your explanation is

correctness.sectionDescription: Multiple AI interpretations of your description tested against unit tests
correctness.label: CORRECTNESS

status.notYetWorkingDesc: None of the versions passed the tests

status.tooDetailedDesc: Describe the goal, not the steps

banner.notWorking: Your explanation didn't produce working code yet. Let's look at what the code tried to do and where it went wrong.
banner.ambiguous: Your explanation could be read in different ways. One interpretation worked, but another didn't. Try being more specific.
banner.tooDetailed: Your explanation focuses on individual steps. Try describing what the code accomplishes overall instead of how it works line-by-line.
banner.complete: Problem complete! Your explanation is clear and correct.

announcement.abstractionLocked: Abstraction is locked. Complete all correctness tests first.

attempts.label: Previous Submissions:
attempts.ariaLabel: View previous submissions. Current: attempt {current} of {total}, score {score}%
attempts.testsPassedButAbstraction: Tests passed but abstraction needs work

mcq.title: Answer Result
mcq.noResult: Select an answer and submit to see your results.

codeSubmission.submitToSeeResults: Submit your solution to see test results

refute.title: Counterexample Result
refute.disprovesClaimExplanation: The function returned {result} for your input, which disproves the claim "{claim}".
refute.supportsClaimExplanation: The function returned {result}, which still supports the claim. Try finding input that produces a result contradicting "{claim}".
refute.enterAndSubmit: Enter function arguments and submit to find a counterexample.

sse.taskTimeout: No response from server after 2 minutes. The task may be stuck.
sse.connectionLost: Connection lost, max reconnect attempts reached

segmentModal.title: Comprehension Level Analysis
segmentModal.openInNewTabAriaLabel: Open understanding analysis in new tab
segmentModal.relationalFeedback: Excellent! Your {count} segments show high-level understanding.
segmentModal.multiStructuralFeedback: Your {count} segments are too detailed. Try to describe the overall purpose in {goal} or fewer segments.
segmentModal.explanationRelational: You focused on the overall purpose. This shows strong conceptual understanding.
segmentModal.explanationMultiStructural: You provided line-by-line detail. Try focusing on the main goal instead.

correctnessModal.title: Correctness Analysis
correctnessModal.summaryHeadlineNone: Your explanation didn't produce working code yet.
correctnessModal.summaryHeadlinePartial: Your explanation is ambiguous — it can be interpreted differently.
correctnessModal.summaryHeadlineAll: Excellent! Your explanation is clear and unambiguous.
correctnessModal.summaryExplanationNone: I generated {total} different code versions from your explanation, but none passed all tests. Review the failing tests to see what's missing from your description.
correctnessModal.summaryExplanationPartial: I generated {total} code versions and {passing} passed. One version interpreted your words differently, causing test failures. Click on the failing version to see what was ambiguous.
correctnessModal.summaryExplanationAll: I generated {total} independent code versions from your explanation, and all of them passed every test. This means your description captured the algorithm's logic precisely.
